search.query: index=sysmon source="WinEventLog:Security" "4625" | rex field=_raw "<EventID[^>]*>(?<EventCode>\d+)</EventID>" | rex field=_raw "<Data Name=['\"]TargetUserName['\"]>(?<username>[^<]*)</Data>" | where EventCode="4625" | eval username=if(isnull(username) OR username="", "unknown_user", username) | timechart span=1h count by username

index=sysmon source="WinEventLog:Security" "4625" | rex field=_raw "<EventID[^>]*>(?<EventCode>\d+)</EventID>" | rex field=_raw "<Data Name=['\"]TargetUserName['\"]>(?<username>[^<]*)</Data>" | where EventCode="4625" | eval username=if(isnull(username) OR username="", "unknown_user", username) | stats count by username | sort - count | head 10

index=sysmon source="WinEventLog:Security" "4625" | rex field=_raw "<EventID[^>]*>(?<EventCode>\d+)</EventID>" | rex field=_raw "<Data Name=['\"]TargetUserName['\"]>(?<username>[^<]*)</Data>" | rex field=_raw "<Data Name=['\"]IpAddress['\"]>(?<source_ip>[^<]*)</Data>" | where EventCode="4625" | eval username=if(isnull(username) OR username="", "unknown_user", username) | eval source_ip=if(isnull(source_ip) OR source_ip="" OR source_ip="-", "localhost", source_ip) | stats count by source_ip, username | sort - count
